name: the drafter emits positive and negative test fixtures (Layer C)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-z --tool eslint --prose 'Never use var.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(!d.fixtures.positive||!d.fixtures.negative)process.exit(1)' && echo fixtures-emitted 1>&2
